channel.title: Professional on TCS Labs Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Professional on TCS Labs Academy

item.title: Certified AI-Native Infrastructure Professional (CAINP)
item.description:
The Certified AI-Native Infrastructure Professional (CAINP) is the TCS Labs Academy’s advanced credential. It validates that you can operate cloud native infrastructure with coding agents in production - observing, diagnosing, responding, performance-testing, and self-healing with Meshery - and that you can integrate agents safely with Meshery through the Model Context Protocol while governing the whole pipeline.

How you earn it 🔗

The credential has two required parts:
